title: 'Traitor of Punjab': AAP Shares AI Video Showing Raghav Chadha Sitting Near Amit Shah's Feet as He Joins BJP
description: AAP escalated its confrontation with Raghav Chadha, who switched from AAP to BJP, by releasing an AI-generated video branding him a "traitor of Punjab." The clip, alleging betrayal of Punjab and party ideals, reflects AAP's strategy amid internal rifts.
